event: FC Naples parted ways with Head Coach Matt Poland and appointed Zak Gordon as interim Head Coach for the remainder of the 2026 season.

Fort Wayne FC extended their USL League One unbeaten streak to 11 matches (2-1 USL Cup loss to Detroit City FC was cross-tier and does not break the league unbeaten run), becoming just the second first-year club in League One history to achieve a double-digit undefeated streak.
Fort Wayne FC drew 4,214 fans to a USL Cup cross-tier home fixture against Detroit City FC at Ruoff Mortgage Stadium.
Fort Wayne FC signed 16-year-old academy player Johnny Aye on an academy contract ahead of their USL Cup match vs Detroit City FC.
Charlotte Independence's eight-match winning streak ended, per League One reporting.
One Knoxville SC moved closer to the League One record for longest road unbeaten streak.

Lionsbridge FC finished the 2026 USL League Two regular season as Chesapeake Division champions with 34 points, a +32 goal difference over 14 games, and entered the playoffs as the Eastern Conference's top Chesapeake seed.
Lionsbridge FC selected as a host site for the 2026 USL League Two Eastern Conference Quarterfinals on July 17.
Sacramento Republic FC won emphatically over Rhode Island FC in a USL Cup fixture, with key players Jack Gurr and Memo Rodriguez returning to fitness.
Rhode Island FC lost to Sacramento Republic FC in a USL Cup group-stage fixture.

North Carolina FC formally applied to join USL's new Division One league launching in 2028, suspended operations for 2026, and is blocked from USL Premier entry by inability to secure financing for a required 15,000-seat stadium in Raleigh.
